name: Date and Nut Chews
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Light corn syrup or dark corn syrup
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
Grease a 9-by-13-inch pan.
In a large bowl, beat together the eggs, salt, and almond extract until light.
Gradually add in the granulated sugar and corn syrup. Mix well.
Add the chopped dates and chopped nuts; stir until combined.
Sift in the all-purpose flour and fold it into the mixture.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until set.
Remove from oven while still hot and cut into 1 1/2-inch squares.
If needed, discard any square pieces from the corners of the pan as they may be too hard.
Shape the remaining pieces into small balls, taking care not to burn your hands.
Roll each ball in powdered sugar, or place sugar and cookies in a paper bag and shake.
Yield: 3 dozen cookies.
Tester's note: The result is a moist cookie with a nice texture from the chopped nuts.
